general_inquiry.question: Find the gradient of the function $f(x,y,z)$ where $f(x,y,z) = \sqrt{\frac{x}{y}}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The gradient of the function \( f(x,y,z) = \sqrt{\frac{x}{y}} \) is:

\[ \nabla f(x,y,z) = \left( \frac{1}{2\sqrt{\frac{x}{y}y}}, -\frac{x}{2y^2\sqrt{\frac{x}{y}}}, 0 \right) \]

or equivalently,

\[ \nabla f(x,y,z) = \left( \frac{1}{2\sqrt{xy}}, -\frac{\sqrt{x}}{2y^{3/2}}, 0 \right) \]
